title: Craft Bedrock
description:
You can Craft bedrock with 9 obsidian
and theres an advancment for placing bedrock
body: Bedrock is usually the one block you can’t break, move, or place in survival. It just sits there at the bottom of the world, untouchable. But now, you’ve found a way around that. By putting together 9 obsidian, you crafted a block that was never meant to be crafted.
